name: IMMUNOGLOBULIN IGG4-RELATED DISEASE
definition: IGG4-RELATED SCLEROSING DISEASE (ISD) = HYPER-IGG4 DISEASE = systemic disease with multiorgan involvement and elevated IgG4 levels

demographics.Histo: diffuse lymphoplasmacytic infiltration (by T-lymphocytes and plasma cells staining

discriminating_features: low T1 signal intensity (= isointense to muscle)
homogeneous low to intermediate SI on T2WI ← increased cellularity + fibrosis

MR: low T1 signal intensity (= isointense to muscle)
homogeneous low to intermediate SI on T2WI ← increased cellularity + fibrosis
